MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF AMANDA RODNER, SETH RODNER's Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint.

Plaintiffs Amanda Susan Rodner and Seth Rodner's motion for leave to file second amended complaint is granted. Defendants Joan Carlene Beighley and Hornblower Cable Cars, Inc. have not opposed the motion. The parties should file any motion to continue the current August 26, 2019 trial date in Department 206.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)
